name: SYPRIS SOLUTIONS INC
summary: Sypris Solutions, Inc. is a Delaware corporation formed in 1997 that operates two segments: Sypris Technologies, which produces forged, machined, welded, and heat-treated steel components for heavy commercial vehicles and high-pressure energy pipelines; and Sypris Electronics, which provides circuit card assembly, full box build manufacturing, systems integration, and design services for aerospace, defense, and space markets. The company serves customers globally through North American operations, often under multi-year, sole-source contracts.

products.name: Axle Shafts
products.description: Forged and machined drive train axle shafts for automotive, truck, and recreational vehicle manufacturers.

products.name: Transmission Shafts
products.description: Forged and machined transmission shafts for commercial vehicle and automotive markets.

products.name: Steer Axle Knuckles
products.description: Forged and machined steer axle knuckles for heavy commercial and off-highway vehicles.

products.name: Gear Sets
products.description: Forged and machined gear sets for drive train assemblies in commercial vehicles.

products.name: High-Pressure Closures
products.description: Fabricated pressurized closures for oil and gas pipelines and industrial applications.

products.name: Insulated Joints
products.description: Specialty pipeline products for oil and gas energy markets.

products.name: Circuit Card Assemblies
products.description: High-reliability circuit card assemblies for radar, navigation, weapons, targeting, and space programs.

products.name: Full Box Build Manufacturing
products.description: Complete electronics box build manufacturing for aerospace and defense customers.

products.name: Systems Assembly and Integration
products.description: Systems assembly and integration services for aerospace, defense, and space electronics markets.

products.name: Design for Manufacturability
products.description: Engineering design services to optimize manufacturability for defense and aerospace electronics customers.

partnerships.description: Sole-source supplier of forged and machined drive train components for GM vehicles.
Supplier of drive train components for Freightliner commercial trucks.
Supplier of drive train components for Mack commercial trucks.
Supplier of forged and machined components for Navistar vehicles.
Supplier of drive train components for PACCAR commercial vehicles.
Supplier of drive train components for Volvo trucks.
Supplier of drive train components for BRP recreational vehicles.
Electronics manufacturing subcontractor for Northrop Grumman aerospace and defense programs.
Electronics manufacturing subcontractor for Lockheed Martin defense programs.
Electronics manufacturing subcontractor for L3Harris defense programs.
Electronics manufacturing subcontractor for Collins Aerospace defense and space programs.
Electronics manufacturing subcontractor for BAE Systems defense programs.
Electronics manufacturing subcontractor for Analog Devices programs.
